category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Cambodian market via the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) conformity framework.

title.en: China-to-Cambodia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入柬埔寨：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入柬埔寨：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Cambodian market-access requirements administered by the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) — adopted CS/IEC luminaire safety standards (CS/IEC 60598 series), lamp safety (IEC 62560), photobiological safety (IEC 62471), conformity and import inspection for regulated products, energy programmes, and Telecommunication Regulator of Cambodia (TRC) type approval for wireless smart lighting — versus Chinese GB 30255 / GB 7000 standards and CCC certification. Cambodia operates a 230 V / 50 Hz grid.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与柬埔寨市场准入要求差距对照，柬埔寨市场准入由柬埔寨标准局（ISC）管理——采用 CS/IEC 灯具安全标准（CS/IEC 60598 系列）、灯安全（IEC 62560）、光生物安全（IEC 62471）、受管制产品的合格评定与进口检验、能效计划及无线智能照明的柬埔寨电信监管局（TRC）型号核准——并与中国 GB 30255 / GB 7000 标准及 CCC 认证对比。柬埔寨电网为 230 V / 50 Hz。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與柬埔寨市場准入要求差距對照，柬埔寨市場准入由柬埔寨標準局（ISC）管理——採用 CS/IEC 燈具安全標準（CS/IEC 60598 系列）、燈安全（IEC 62560）、光生物安全（IEC 62471）、受管制產品的合格評定與進口檢驗、能效計劃及無線智能照明的柬埔寨電信監管局（TRC）型號核准——並與中國 GB 30255 / GB 7000 標準及 CCC 認證對比。柬埔寨電網為 230 V / 50 Hz。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Cambodian law, ISC-adopted CS standards, conformity and import-inspection procedures, energy programme requirements, and TRC type-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the relevant Cambodian authorities before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及柬埔寨相关主管部门核验现行柬埔寨法律、ISC 采用的 CS 标准、合格评定与进口检验程序、能效计划要求及 TRC 型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及柬埔寨相關主管部門核驗現行柬埔寨法律、ISC 採用的 CS 標準、合格評定與進口檢驗程序、能效計劃要求及 TRC 型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Cambodia should expect: product conformity against ISC-adopted Cambodian Standards (CS), which are typically adopted from IEC — luminaire safety to the CS/IEC 60598 series and self-ballasted lamp safety to IEC 62560; conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products coordinated through the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) and the in-country importer; photobiological safety assessment to IEC 62471 where applicable; alignment with any applicable Cambodian energy programmes / minimum energy performance initiatives (Cambodia has no EU-style mandatory Ecodesign efficacy regulation or A-G energy label, so the China-export 'ecodesign' lane maps onto these energy programmes rather than a binding efficacy floor); Telecommunication Regulator of Cambodia (TRC) type approval for wireless/smart lighting; and design for the 230 V / 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V). Cambodia has no horizontal RoHS, REACH-style SVHC, or battery/outdoor-noise regime equivalent to the EU — those obligations are largely absent and are flagged as such. CCC certification and Chinese GB test reports are not automatically recognised; an in-country importer and ISC conformity route are needed.
answer_first.zh: 向柬埔寨出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期：依据 ISC 采用的柬埔寨标准（CS，通常采自 IEC）进行产品符合性评定——灯具安全按 CS/IEC 60598 系列、自镇流灯安全按 IEC 62560；受管制产品的合格评定与进口检验通过柬埔寨标准局（ISC）及在地进口商协调；适用时按 IEC 62471 进行光生物安全评估；符合任何适用的柬埔寨能效计划/最低能效要求倡议（柬埔寨没有欧盟式强制生态设计能效法规或 A-G 能效标签，因此中国出口的 ＂ecodesign＂ 通道对应这些能效计划，而非约束性能效下限）；无线/智能照明须取得柬埔寨电信监管局（TRC）型号核准；并针对 230 V / 50 Hz 电网设计（50 Hz 与中国一致，但标称电压与中国 220/380 V 不同）。柬埔寨没有相当于欧盟的横向 RoHS、REACH 式 SVHC 或电池/户外噪声制度——这些义务基本缺失，并据实标注。CCC 认证及中国 GB 检测报告不被自动认可；须有在地进口商及 ISC 合格评定路径。
answer_first.zht: 向柬埔寨出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期：依據 ISC 採用的柬埔寨標準（CS，通常採自 IEC）進行產品符合性評定——燈具安全按 CS/IEC 60598 系列、自鎮流燈安全按 IEC 62560；受管制產品的合格評定與進口檢驗通過柬埔寨標準局（ISC）及在地進口商協調；適用時按 IEC 62471 進行光生物安全評估；符合任何適用的柬埔寨能效計劃/最低能效要求倡議（柬埔寨沒有歐盟式強制生態設計能效法規或 A-G 能效標籤，因此中國出口的 ＂ecodesign＂ 通道對應這些能效計劃，而非約束性能效下限）；無線/智能照明須取得柬埔寨電信監管局（TRC）型號核准；並針對 230 V / 50 Hz 電網設計（50 Hz 與中國一致，但標稱電壓與中國 220/380 V 不同）。柬埔寨沒有相當於歐盟的橫向 RoHS、REACH 式 SVHC 或電池/戶外噪聲制度——這些義務基本缺失，並據實標註。CCC 認證及中國 GB 檢測報告不被自動認可；須有在地進口商及 ISC 合格評定路徑。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify ISC-adopted CS standard references, conformity/import-inspection procedures, energy programme status, and TRC type-approval scope on each review cycle against official Cambodian sources before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Where Cambodia lacks a regime (RoHS / SVHC / horizontal chemical restriction), the row must say so plainly rather than inferring an equivalent. CCC and Chinese GB references describe the CN baseline only.
